title: The world of touch: an international survey of tactile maps. Part 1: production
abstract: This paper reports the findings of an international survey that collected data on production methods, techniques, outputs and design preferences among tactile map producers, designers and researchers worldwide. A number of consistencies and inconsistencies are identified and the authors speculate on the extent to which the current state of tactile map production is well matched to the needs of the client population. In this first part of the report the sample on which the report is based is described, along with the work it covers in terms of quantity of maps produced, choice of production method, types of environment mapped and intended uses of maps.
